title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 79.210 - Mayor — communications to board
text:
79.210.  Mayor — communications to board. — The mayor shall, from time to time, communicate to the board of aldermen such measures as may, in his opinion, tend to the improvement of the finances, the police, health, security, ornament, comfort and general prosperity of the city.
(RSMo 1939 § 7105) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 6955; 1919 § 8406; 1909 § 9308
